patches.summary: Added a CLI installer for the EverBee agent skill.
patches.reason: Claude and Codex need a stable way to install the bundled SKILL.md from an installed Go binary.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... and go vet ./... passed; skill install dry run reports Claude and Codex destinations.

patches.summary: Aligned generated auto-refresh with the local syncResource signature.
patches.reason: The reprinted cache auto-refresh hook called syncResource with a trailing stderr writer argument, but EverBee's hand-authored syncResource path no longer accepts that parameter.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./..., go vet ./..., and go build ./... passed after the signature fix.

patches.summary: Preserved integer JSON resource IDs without scientific notation.
patches.reason: EverBee listing IDs can arrive as JSON numbers; using fmt.Sprint on decoded float64 values changed IDs like 55043301 into 5.5043301e+07 and broke sync/store identity.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passed, including large integer ID preservation tests for batch and single-object sync paths.

patches.summary: Expanded the generated version command description.
patches.reason: tools-audit flagged the generated 'Print version' short text as too thin for agent-facing command discovery.
patches.validated_outcome: cli-printing-press tools-audit reports no pending findings.

patches.summary: Added parent-command examples for cache-aware insight workflows.
patches.reason: workflow-verify executes the command string, while dogfood maps workflow steps from parent help output; parent examples keep executable workflow steps discoverable without changing command behavior.
patches.validated_outcome: cli-printing-press workflow-verify reports workflow-pass and dogfood no longer reports unmapped insight workflow steps.

patches.summary: Addressed PR review findings across MCP binding, local search, sync diagnostics, cache keys, probes, rate limiting, and Make targets.
patches.reason: Code review found generated runtime edge cases that could expose local services broadly, panic on empty display data, ignore search filters, emit invalid JSON diagnostics, collide cache entries, hang probes, burst concurrent rate-limited requests, or skip synthetic Make targets.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./..., go vet ./..., go build ./..., and git diff --check passed before commit 2666474.

deferred_to_upstream.feature: Generate hardened runtime defaults for printed CLIs, including local MCP binding, cache-safe request keys, sync diagnostics, pagination metadata, probe behavior, rate limiter pacing, and Make targets.
deferred_to_upstream.reason: These fixes address systemic generated runtime behavior and should be generated by Printing Press rather than carried as EverBee-only local patches.

patches.summary: Hardened redirect auth handling, refresh persistence fallback, and auto-refresh policy after publish review.
patches.reason: Greptile flagged credential re-injection after cross-host redirect bounces, dropping fresh API data when snapshot persistence fails, and redundant per-resource stale windows that matched the global default.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... and go vet ./... passed in the source checkout and packaged library copy; govulncheck ./... passed in the packaged library copy.

deferred_to_upstream.feature: Generated HTTP client redirect handling should compare against the immediately previous redirect hop before re-adding auth.
deferred_to_upstream.reason: This security hardening belongs in generated runtime code so future CLIs do not need local review patches.

deferred_to_upstream.feature: Generated research refresh runtime should preserve usable fetched evidence when snapshot persistence fails.
deferred_to_upstream.reason: A local cache write failure should warn while still returning live API data to the command result.

deferred_to_upstream.feature: Generator should omit per-resource cache freshness overrides when they equal the global stale-after default.
deferred_to_upstream.reason: No-op generated overrides confuse review and carry no runtime behavior.

patches.summary: Made MCP research/search guidance live-first with targeted local caching instead of sync-first.
patches.reason: EverBee tools should use current live API data for requested research slices, storing returned evidence locally for repeated analysis without bulk-syncing all records.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./internal/mcp ./internal/cli, go test ./..., go vet ./..., go build ./..., and git diff --check passed.

patches.summary: Rewrote packaged self-imports to the public library module path.
patches.reason: publish package updated go.mod but left generated imports pointing at the local everbee-pp-cli module path, causing the library copy to fail go build.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./..., go vet ./..., go build ./..., and govulncheck ./... pass inside library/marketing/everbee after import rewrite.

deferred_to_upstream.feature: cli-printing-press publish package rewrites generated self-imports when --module-path changes the module path.
deferred_to_upstream.reason: This package-only patch should disappear once publish package emits buildable source for public-library module paths.
